title: Valid Anagram
description:
Given two strings `s` and `t`, return `true` if `t` is an anagram of `s`, and `false` otherwise.

An anagram is a word formed by rearranging the letters of another, using all original letters exactly once.
hints: An anagram uses the same characters the same number of times.
Count character frequencies in both strings.
Compare the frequency counts — they must be identical.
